# AmiorAI application dependencies.
#
# Language models are served by LM Studio or user-configured OpenAI-compatible/Runpod endpoints.
# Images are generated by local/remote ComfyUI or user-owned Runpod endpoints.
# This frontend environment therefore does not need llama-cpp-python, torch or diffusers.

# Secure Civitai token storage (Windows Credential Manager, Secret Service, Keychain).
keyring>=25.0

# Spreadsheet import/export helpers used by the application.
openpyxl>=3.1.0

# Optional local dictation:
#   pip install faster-whisper
# TTS uses its own isolated environment under tts_server/.
